query:
SELECT swl.productName, swl.productType, swl.amountExGst, swl.customerName, swu.supplierName
FROM supplier_workbook_line_items swl
JOIN supplier_workbook_uploads swu ON swu.id = swl.uploadId
WHERE swl.customerName LIKE '%ASG Hail%'
  AND (swl.productName LIKE '%Webex Basic%' OR swl.productName LIKE '%UCXcel%')
LIMIT 20;
